acceptance_criteria: All process artifact contracts exist in schemas/contracts/v1.
Rust process artifact mirrors round-trip through serde and appear in the embedded schema registry.

open_questions.question: Contract field sets stay additive and aligned with the validator.

functional_requirements: Add work item, stage, and refinement contracts.
Expose matching Rust structs for validator consumption.
success_metrics: Process artifacts serialize and deserialize cleanly.
Embedded contract registry exposes the new documents.
assumptions: JSON contract field lists are sufficient for this v1 schema registry.
